reason: Backend guideline index for verifying API, persistence, orchestration, executor, audit, and logging work.
Verify backend files follow the expected module layout.
Verify migrations and persistence models for tasks, assets, audit logs, results, and configs.
Verify validation, authorization, executor, and workflow errors are handled consistently.
Verify audit logging and log ingestion follow the project guidance.
Verify backend quality and security-sensitive implementation standards.
Frontend guideline index for verifying the analyst UI and dashboard.
Verify frontend files follow the expected layout.
Verify UI components are composed according to project guidance.
Verify frontend data access and hooks are consistent.
Verify UI state for tasks, assets, dashboards, and settings is managed consistently.
Verify shared API models and UI data use type-safe contracts.
Verify frontend quality standards for the security operations interface.
Verify data flow remains consistent across database, API, orchestration, and UI layers.
Verify shared constants, schemas, permissions, and workflow definitions are reused rather than duplicated.
